title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
